calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-033b OFC-analog oracle landing (UC6 round-trip)
items.notes: 6-sub-test landing diagnostic extending V3-EXQ-485. UC1-UC5 carried over (instantiation, gate modulates update, bias zero at init, backward compat, reset clears state_code). UC6 NEW: oracle round-trip -- (A) query_outcome() output bit-identical to e2_harm_s.forward() (max diff < 1e-6); (B) AssertionError when oracle disabled; (C) reset() clears _last_outcome_prediction + _ofc_oracle_predictions; (D) oracle_is_ready=False by default; (E) get_state() exposes oracle_enabled=True and last_oracle_pred_norm > 0 after a query. Validates MECH-263 specific-outcome oracle path (OFCConfig.use_outcome_oracle). Pure deterministic arithmetic; no env steps.

items.title: SD-048 interoceptive-noise comparator-gap behavioural recalibrated (scale=3.0)
items.note: Recalibrated successor to EXQ-512. Raises interoceptive_noise_scale to 3.0 (was 1.0 default). EXQ-512 failed C3 because autonomic sigma=0.02 at scale=1.0 is below the forward model natural prediction-error floor (~0.025-0.035 in both arms). Scale=3.0 is a mechanism proof; v3_pending holds pending a default-scale calibration sweep. Pre-registered thresholds: C1_MIN_GAP_ARM_A=0.0, C2_MIN_R2_ARM_B=0.5, C3_MIN_QUIET_GAP=0.005. PASS lifts SD-048 v3_pending gate.

items.title: MECH-302 relief-completion behavioural discriminative pair
items.note: Behavioural discriminative pair: ARM_A (MECH-302 ON) vs ARM_B (OFF). Uses limb_damage_enabled=True (SD-022) for natural z_harm_a rise/fall dynamics. Gate (c) for MECH-304 conditioned-inhibition experiment. Smoke PASS (dry-run, 2026-05-04).
